text.message: Hello, im an emotional revenge blocker
you poked the bear that is black
i will not respond to extortion every single 7 roll..
otherwise i gotta take the port
You could have gone for the 10 brick port
you are helping him out, not the other way around
can do it on your turn
that doesnt work like that but here u go
cuz red stole my wheat that u missed to trade
think u need me to fight army,
yeah why would tat help anyone bt you
keep robbing the guy in last red, sure is a winning strat
ya hes doing weirdnthing not blockin red
Both black and white are on 7
You should trade me to slow down white
you are asking for deals that favours you over the guy in last
so i dont get your point
